creator: kevin@bostoncrypto.com
text:
Created attachment 164024
Patch for rc.conf.5 updating Kerberos options

Most of the Kerberos related scripts in /etc/rc.d have been renamed and/or updated, but the current names and options are not reflected in the rc.conf man page.

See Bug 205146 for a description of related content in the Handbook which lead me to the man page issues.
